results.name: Pakistan
results.key_finding: Balochistan enforced-disappearance crackdown deepens (6 more disappeared Jul 1); reinforces existing EQU/ACC deficits, part of harm external (Taliban drone strikes); sub-threshold.

results.name: Venezuela
results.key_finding: Earthquake day 14 (toll 3,535+); evidenced response-failure move remains -2.7 (sub-threshold). Re-check outcome: does NOT cross 5-pt threshold; strong downward watch sustained.

results.name: Turkey
results.key_finding: NEW entrant: NATO-summit mass crackdown (209-225 arrested incl. journalists/lawyers, HRW-condemned) continues documented opposition/press-suppression pattern already priced into recent 10.3 baseline; sub-threshold.

results.name: Ukraine
results.key_finding: Record Russian strike campaign (Jul 5-6 Kyiv assault) is harm inflicted BY Russia, scored against Russia; Ukraine own-conduct unchanged.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: Floor (0.0) sustained; Jul 6 cabinet approval of 13 new West Bank settlements + settler-violence escalation (~6/day) reinforce floor but cannot move composite lower.

results.name: Cuba
results.key_finding: Third islandwide blackout in six months (Jul 6); continuation of infrastructure-collapse crisis with significant external-embargo driver; sub-threshold.

results.name: Burkina Faso
results.key_finding: UN permanently closes its human-rights office (Jul 2) — discrete accountability-infrastructure removal erodes the residual-UN-cooperation rationale but ACC already 1.1 (sub-threshold). SHARPENS open Mali/Burkina calibration flag; documented for coordinator, not unilaterally resolved.

results.name: Mali
results.key_finding: JNIM/FLA offensive widens to Bamako siege; harm largely non-state. Uniform-1.5 baseline never re-derived against atrocity findings (unlike Burkina Faso). Calibration flag documented for coordinator.

results.name: Democratic Republic of the Congo
results.key_finding: Ebola toll surpasses 500 (Jul 6); continuation of near-floor epidemic/conflict record. Bundibugyo trial progress marginally positive but external and insufficient to move any dimension.

results.name: Russia
results.key_finding: Floor (0.0) sustained; sustained strike campaign (~170 civilian casualties/day, highest since 2023) + new EU sanctions proposal reinforce floor; no scored delta.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: Floor (0.0) sustained; El Obeid siege (500k trapped) + UNHRC-ordered urgent inquiry reinforce floor; no scored delta.

results.name: Kenya
results.key_finding: NEW entrant: Saba Saba march pre-emptively blocked (Jul 7, ~10 arrested); prior-restraint action materially less severe than 2025 (41 killed); consistent with existing EQU/ACC deficits; sub-threshold.

results.name: xAI/Grok
results.key_finding: NEW child-safety evidence: deepfake-CSAM class action amended (Jul 7) adding two minor victims (real photos used incl. ~7,000 images of an 11-year-old). Floor (0.0) sustained; reinforces existing pending proposal, no new proposal.

results.name: Nigeria
results.key_finding: Food insecurity deepens ~2M faster than projected (17M+ in Crisis+); worsening of structural famine crisis already captured in the recent Jun-19 band-crossing downgrade; sub-threshold.

results.name: China
results.key_finding: Ethnic Unity Law consolidation continues; discrete triggering event (self-immolation) not repeated this cycle; no new >=5pt deterioration; sub-threshold.

calibration_flags_documented: mali-burkina-faso-cross-peer (open, coordinator-level; sharpened this cycle by Burkina Faso UN human-rights office closure — accountability-infrastructure asymmetry supports BF<Mali; separately, Mali uniform-1.5 baseline never re-derived against atrocity findings; recommend flag-for-review, do not resolve unilaterally)
